name: jonas-skills-marketplace
description: A curated collection of personal Claude skills — from adventure trip planning to domain-specific development guides. Built to work across Claude Code and Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description:
Personal skills collection for Claude.

Included skills:

• The Traveler — Collaborative trip planning from a vague idea to a complete interactive itinerary. Deep research into hidden gems, adventure activities, wildlife spotting, old towns, and local food. Produces a visual React itinerary with Leaflet route map, interactive timeline, and detailed stop cards with external links.

More skills coming soon.
